exploration_notes: The bug is in braveadblock.py's read_cache() method (line 239). When the ad-blocker cache file exists but is unreadable (e.g. due to permission errors from a disk error or system crash during cache write), adblock's deserialize_from_file() raises an OSError/PermissionError. The _map_exceptions() context manager (line 130) only catches adblock.DeserializationError (or ValueError for old adblock versions), and the except clause in read_cache() (line 252) only catches the custom DeserializationErro
